case_title: NARGIZ SADYKHOVA VS. TEODORA K. MIHAYLOVA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SADYKHOVA, NARGIZ AS TO DEFENDANT MIHAYLOVA, TEODORA K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
LETTER FROM DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT MIHAYLOVA, TEODORA K.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-04-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIHAYLOVA, TEODORA K.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT. JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JPT JEAN MILEFF FILED BY MIHAYLOVA, TEODORA K.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SADYKHOVA, NARGIZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MIHAYLOVA, TEODORA K. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
